body_text:
FYI â March 2020
FYI â March 2020
BC Credit Unions
Effective November 1, 2019, FICOM ceased operations and BCFSA became the new regulator of credit unions in BC. BCFSA also replaced FICOM as administrator of Credit Union Deposit Insurance Corporation.
Ontario Credit Unions
Effective June 8, 2019, the Financial Services Regulatory Authority (FSRA) assumed the regulatory functions of the Financial Services Commission of Ontario (FSCO) and the Deposit Insurance Corporation of Ontario (DICO).
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
AFT Volume
Originating AFT via CAFT (BC) Part
Section 1.4, Contacts and Websites
All references to FICOM have been changed to BCFSA.
Provided BCFSA contact information.
Section 2.1 Definitions
All references to FICOM have been changed to BCFSA.
Originating AFT Via File Transmission (BC) Part
Section 1.2, Contacts and Websites
All references to FICOM have been changed to BCFSA.
Provided BCFSA contact information.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Funds Transfers Part
Section 1.5, Contacts and Websites
All references to FICOM have been changed to BCFSA.
Provided BCFSA contact information.
All references to FSCO have been changed to FSRA.
Provided FSRA contact information.
Section 2.1, Definitions
All references to FICOM have been changed to BCFSA.
All references to FSCO have been changed to FSRA.
Chapter 3, Legal Considerations
All references to FICOM have been changed to BCFSA.
All references to FSCO have been changed to FSRA.
